// 01. about

Who I Am

I recently completed my B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering at Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology (2022–2026), Greater Noida. I'm passionate about building things that live on the internet — from clean RESTful APIs to intelligent AI-powered applications.

My journey started with Python and quickly expanded into full-stack development with FastAPI and React, then into Machine Learning and Generative AI. I love turning complex problems into elegant, working solutions.

As a Technical Member of Google Developer Student Clubs, I've led workshops, mentored students, and collaborated on real-world projects. I believe the best code is code that solves real problems for real people.

// 03. projects

What I've Built

FEATURED PROJECT
AHC
↗ GitHub
Aurora Health Companion
A cross-platform mobile health companion app built with React Native & Expo, helping users track sleep, daily habits, and nutrition through a clean glassmorphic interface.
  • Built with React Native + Expo for a smooth cross-platform (Android/iOS) experience
  • Sleep, habit, and nutrition tracking modules with a modern glass-effect UI
  • Handles empty states gracefully for a polished first-run experience
  • Includes one-command APK build scripts for Windows, Mac & Linux
React NativeExpoJavaScriptMobile AppUI/UX
AI
↗ GitHub
AI Code Reviewer
A full-stack AI-powered code review platform that analyzes code for bugs, security issues, performance, and style — across 7 languages, powered by an AI API.
  • FastAPI backend + React 18 frontend with dark terminal-style UI
  • Structured JSON prompts return severity-rated feedback (High/Medium/Low)
  • Animated 0–100 quality score across 5 tabbed categories
FastAPIReact 18AI APIPython

Employee Performance Prediction
End-to-end ML pipeline predicting employee productivity with an interactive Streamlit web app for real-time analysis.

  • Deployed via Pickle-serialized model on Streamlit
